case_title: NATASHA DUREL VS. DARRELL MOLETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DUREL, NATASHA AS TO DEFENDANT MOLETT, DARRELL TURNER, CHERYL DIANE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, CHERYL DIANE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF NATHASH DUREL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARRELL MOLETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHERYL TURNER IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS INFORMED THAT THE SERVICE ON CHERLY TURNER WAS NOT TIMELY. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT SHE WOULD DISMISS HER CLAIM AGAINST CHERYL TURNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUREL, NATASHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLETT, DARRELL $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, AT PLAINTIFFS REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CHERYL TURNER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COSTS ARE NOT AWARDED BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS OFFERED AND PLAINTIFF HAS REFUSED TO ACCEPT $750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF NATASHA DUREL RE: NAME CORRECTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUREL, NATASHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED DEC-20-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOLETT, DARRELL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DUREL, NATASHA AS TO DEFENDANT MOLETT, DARRELL TURNER, CHERYL DIANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-07-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NATASHA DUREL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DARRELL MOLET; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHERYL TURNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEBRUARY 7, 2017 AT 1:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
